query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN '1-30 días'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60 días'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90 días'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) > 90 THEN '+90 días'
    ELSE '0 días'
  END as rango,
  COUNT(*) as cantidadFacturas,
  SUM(importeTotal) as montoTotal
FROM facturas
WHERE estadoPago = 'pendiente'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN 1
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN 2
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN 3
    WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fecha) > 90 THEN 4
    ELSE 0
  END;
